description: Mixed-malformed ZRead read_file response: surrounding/trailing data outside the outer wrapper. The characterized File grammar is a whole-response wrapper (only whitespace allowed outside); this response must fail even though a wrapper is present.
raw:
Leading prose that precedes the wrapper is not allowed.
<file_content>
# Project README

Body content here.
</file_content>
Trailing prose that follows the wrapper is not allowed.
